hero.title: The Vankari Debt
hero.tagline: Power protects the guilty — jab tak koi use collect karne ka decide na kare. Ek dark thriller modern India ke backdrop par jahan ancient tribal secrets aur deadly consequences aapas me takrate hain.

dashboard.title: OPERATIONAL TARGET CONFIGURATION
dashboard.onboarding: 🎯 HOW TO EXECUTE: 1. Objective drop-down menu se apna target digital goal select karein. 2. Apni preferred interaction language output choose karein. 3. Multi-step execution timeline build karne, master JSON prompts download karne, aur custom tool sandboxes ko activate karne ke liye Compile Roadmap par click karein.

roadmap.title: WORKFLOW PROTOCOLS
roadmap.subtitle: Roadmap Builder
roadmap.emptyHeader: Shuru karne ke liye Objective Select Karo
roadmap.emptyDesc: Apna optimized roadmap workflow generate karne ke liye upar control center me primary objective aur language select karein.
roadmap.genPromptDesc: Structured JSON payload generate karne ke liye niche apni requirements details likhein:
roadmap.textareaPlaceholder: Apni custom details yahan enter karo (e.g., dark mode ke sath portfolio web app banao)...
roadmap.genPromptLoading: ⏳ Llama se JSON generate ho raha hai...
roadmap.noNodesDesc: Criteria se match karta koi system nahi mila. Budget limit badhayein ya target goal change karein.

toast.localGen: JSON Prompt locally generate ho gaya! Step 2 par jayein.
toast.copied: JSON Prompt clipboard par copy ho gaya!
toast.masterCopied: Master Prompt copy hua! ChatGPT open ho raha hai...
toast.llamaSuccess: Llama 3.3 se JSON Prompt successfully generate ho gaya!
toast.offlineGen: Static JSON prompt generate kiya (Offline Fallback)
toast.compareLimit: Aap ek sath 3 se zyada tools compare nahi kar sakte.

library.title: SYSTEM MODULE LIBRARY
library.subtitle: Matched AI Execution Nodes Search & Filter Karo
library.searchPlaceholder: System nodes search karo (e.g. ChatGPT, Midjourney)...
library.emptyState: Aapki search se match karta koi node nahi mila.
library.noMatch: FILTER SE MATCH KARTI KOI SERVICE NAHI MILI
library.noMatchDesc: Search terms change karein ya koi dusra industry chip select karein.

categories.title: Node Category Compass
categories.subtitle: Industrial Sector ke hisab se Mappings check karo.
categories.emptyTitle: Koi System Node Mapped nahi hai
categories.emptyDesc: Is sector ke liye koi operational automation configured nahi hai.

about.title: About AI-OS
about.subtitle: AI Overall Solutions — Engineered by Anuj.
about.para1: AI-OS ek enterprise-grade execution platform hai jise A.R. Labs ne design kiya hai taaki advanced algorithmic tools, workflows, aur automated pipeline generation sabhi ke liye accessible ho sake.
about.para2: Whether you want to generate creative videos, build applications, draft code, or automate complex business workflows, AI-OS dynamically optimized workflow roadmaps compile karta hai, single universal master prompts provide karta hai, aur world-class tool chains recommend karta hai. Yahan koi course syllabus plans, theory chapters, ya certification checkpoints nahi hain—sirf step-by-step execution guides hain taaki aap apna objective achieve kar sakein.

bottomShowcase.label: ✦ A.R. PUBLICATIONS
bottomShowcase.tagline: The Literary Universe of Anuj Rawal

footer.desc: Technology, AI, publishing, aur digital products ek hi premium ecosystem ke under built hain.
footer.jurisdiction: Jurisdiction Notice: All interactions governed exclusively by India ke laws ke according, under exclusive jurisdiction of Indore, MP, India ke competent courts.

quickStartCard.title: ⚡ Quick Start
quickStartCard.subtitle: Apna task sirf 3 simple steps me complete karo.
quickStartCard.step1Desc: Aap kya create karna chahte hain uski details enter karo.
quickStartCard.step1Placeholder: Apna idea describe karo (e.g. futuristic cyberpunk city)...
quickStartCard.step3Desc: Recommended AI tool open karke JSON paste karo.

Design and Prototype Hardware.reason: Industrial design concepts, PCB visualization, product ideation aur hardware renders ke liye best hai.
Design and Prototype Hardware.quick_guide: Apna hardware idea ChatGPT me describe karke JSON prompt generate karein, fir use concept visualize karne ke liye Flux AI me use karein.

Generate a Complete AI Video.reason: Prompt-based workflows ke sath cinematic AI video generation ke liye sabse best tool hai.
Generate a Complete AI Video.quick_guide: ChatGPT se JSON prompt generate karein aur professional video generation ke liye use Flow AI me paste karein.

Generate Professional AI Images.reason: Structured prompts ke sath high-quality image generation support karta hai.
Generate Professional AI Images.quick_guide: ChatGPT se JSON prompt create karein aur seedhe Flow AI me images generate karein.

Create Digital Designs Using AI.reason: Presentations, social media posts, banners, posters aur marketing creatives ke liye best hai.
Create Digital Designs Using AI.quick_guide: Design prompt generate karein aur Canva AI ke andar editable graphics create karein.

Build Software Using AI.reason: Agentic coding environment jo complete applications banane me capable hai.
quick_guide: Windows/macOS/Linux ke liye desktop version download karein.
Agent ko project generate aur edit karne dein.

Build Android Application.reason: Google ki taraf se official Android development environment.
quick_guide: Official website se Android Studio download karein.
Default setup use karke install karein.
Naya project open ya create karein.
Apne preferred AI coding assistant ke sath generated prompt use karein.

Monetize AI Skills.title: AI Skills se Paise Kaise Kamayein
Monetize AI Skills.reason: AI services aur digital work sell karne ke liye sabse bade marketplaces me se ek.

steps.title: Step 1 - Create Fiverr Account
steps.description: Fiverr profile create karein, professional username, profile image, bio aur skill setup.

steps.title: Step 2 - Create Your First Gig
steps.description: gig title, thumbnail, pricing, description aur delivery time specify karein.

steps.title: Step 3 - AI Services You Can Sell
steps.description: Niche diye gaye top AI services offer karein:

steps.title: Step 4 - Get First Client
steps.description: portfolio building, gig optimization, keywords, quick response time aur good reviews.

steps.title: Step 5 - Scale Income
steps.description: multiple gigs create karein, upsells aur repeat clients handle karein.

Create Music Using AI.quick_guide: Natural English prompt generate karein aur Suno AI me lyrics aur vocals ke sath complete songs banayein.

steps.title: ElevenLabs open karein
steps.description: AI voice synthesis dashboard access karne ke liye official ElevenLabs website par jayein.

steps.title: Account create karein ya Sign In karein
steps.description: Apni voice settings aur generations ko save karne ke liye free account banayein ya log in karein.

steps.title: Text to Speech open karein
steps.description: Main speech synthesis interface par jayein jahan aap apni script likhte hain.

steps.title: Ek Voice choose karein
steps.description: Voice library browse karein aur apne content ke hisab se best voice profile select karein.

steps.title: Voice settings adjust karein
steps.description: Voice tone ko customize karne ke liye stability, clarity, aur style parameters ko fine-tune karein.

steps.title: Apni script input karein
steps.description: Apni written script ko text area me paste ya type karein aur punctuation check karein.

steps.title: Speech generate karein
steps.description: Generate button par click karein aur AI ko text ko natural voice me badalne ka time dein.

steps.title: Audio preview karein
steps.description: Sahi pronunciation, speed aur tone check karne ke liye generated voice-over ko sun kar check karein.

steps.title: File download karein
steps.description: Apne projects me use karne ke liye final MP3 ya WAV audio file download karein.

tips: Natural pauses ke liye punctuation add karein.
Multiple versions generate karke compare karein.

Build a Brand Using AI.reason: Google Labs ka brand creation platform jo aapka Business DNA learn karta hai.

steps.title: Pomelli open karein
steps.description: Apni branding journey start karne ke liye Google Labs ke Pomelli tool par jayein.

steps.title: Business Assets provide karein
steps.description: Source material ke roop me use karne ke liye apni existing website link, logos, ya text descriptions upload karein.

steps.title: Brand Identity analyze karein
steps.description: Pomelli ko colors, fonts, images aur tone seekhne aur analyze karne dein.

steps.title: Business DNA generate karein
steps.description: Ek comprehensive Business DNA profile receive karein jisme brand guidelines aur mission statements hon.

steps.title: Marketing Campaigns create karein
steps.description: Apne specific target audience ke liye customized marketing campaigns aur strategies generate karein.

steps.title: Brand Book generate karein
steps.description: Apne visual guidelines aur copy styling ke sath cohesive brand book create aur review karein.

steps.title: Landing Page draft karein
steps.description: Naye brand guidelines ke sath match hone wala website draft aur landing page layout generate karein.

steps.title: Brand Assets export karein
steps.description: Generated visual elements aur logos ko final touch dein aur high quality me export karein.

Build a Personal AI Assistant.reason: Autonomous multi-agent development aur local execution support karta hai.
quick_guide: Official website se Antigravity desktop download karein.
Generated AI assistant prompt paste karein.
Agent ko assistant automatically create, test aur refine karne dein.

Study Using AI.reason: Google ka source-grounded research assistant jo summaries, audio overviews aur study guides generate karta hai.

steps.title: NotebookLM open karein
steps.description: Google ke NotebookLM web dashboard par jayein aur Gmail account se login karein.

steps.title: Notebook create karein
steps.description: Kisi specific subject ke study sources ko organize karne ke liye ek naya workspace notebook banayein.

steps.title: Study Material upload karein
steps.description: Apne textbooks, PDFs, lecture slides ya personal class notes ko sources ke roop me add karein.

steps.title: Sources index hone dein
steps.description: NotebookLM ko aapke uploaded materials ko deeply understand aur index karne ke liye 1 minute dein.

steps.title: Naturally sawal poochein
steps.description: Apne sources se related koi bhi question poochein, AI strictly aapke uploaded content se hi answer dega.

steps.title: Summaries generate karein
steps.description: Bade chapters ya complex theories ke auto-generated short summaries aur bullet points read karein.

steps.title: Study Guides aur FAQs banayein
steps.description: Exam prep ke liye quick study guides, word lists, aur practice questions create karein.

steps.title: Revision Notes compile karein
steps.description: Subject revision ke liye main concepts aur definitions ko note cards me save karein.

steps.title: Audio Overviews sunein
steps.description: Revision ke liye pure notebook material ka interactive two-host AI audio podcast generate karke sunein.

Crack Interview Using AI.reason: Google Gemini mobile app ka interactive real-time voice mode mock interview ke liye perfect hai.

steps.title: Gemini Mobile App open karein
steps.description: Apne Android ya iOS device par official Google Gemini app launch karein.

steps.title: Gemini Live start karein
steps.description: Real-time voice conversation mode active karne ke liye bottom-right side me click karein.

steps.title: Voice Profile select karein
steps.description: Ek continuous conversational voice choose karein jiske sath aap talk karne me comfortable hon.

steps.title: Context set karein
steps.description: AI ko batayein ki aap kis company, position aur experience level ke liye prep kar rahe hain.

steps.title: Mock Interview prompt karein
steps.description: AI ko kahein: 'Is job ke liye mera mock interview lo. Ek baar me sirf ek question poochna aur mere answer ka wait karna.'

steps.title: Voice se answer karein
steps.description: Questions ke answers continuous voice me dein, words ko clear pronounce karein aur professional language maintain karein.

steps.title: Instant Feedback lein
steps.description: Mock complete hone ke baad AI se apne answers ka standard review, weak points aur improvements poochein.

steps.title: Multiple Rounds practice karein
steps.description: Alag-alag scenarios, technical questions aur behavioral questions ke liye test rounds bar-bar repeat karein.

steps.title: Communication level boost karein
steps.description: Practice ke sath apni voice depth, pronunciation, presentation speed aur answers structure improve karein.

business.onboardingTitle: AI-OS Business me aapka swagat hai
business.onboardingSubtitle: Apni interface language aur starting workspace select karein:
business.moduleDashboardDesc: Real-time market indices, currency exchange rates, aur active tech business news feeds.
business.moduleLearnDesc: Business validation, value-based pricing, margins, aur contracts ki basic practical learning.
business.moduleBuildDesc: Apne budget ke hisab se setup costs, tech stacks, aur execution blueprints compile karein.
business.moduleGrowDesc: AI Advisor ke sath interact karke strategic business plans aur roadmap compile karein.
business.dashboardSubheading: Business logic tools deploy karein, global market metrics monitor karein, aur operations scale karein.
business.monitorSub: * Prices live exchange rates ke sath Indian Rupees (₹) me convert kiye gaye hain.
business.newsSub: Worldwide tech, venture capital, aur AI software industry se live updates.
business.academySubheading: High-margin digital agencies aur SaaS build karne ke liye practical operational knowledge.
business.academyPara: Concept check quizzes aur validated models ke sath pricing structures, contracts aur validation seekhein.
business.launchpadSubheading: Apne startup ke liye execution blueprints, tools stack, aur localized cost estimates compile karein.
business.growSubheading: High-margin scaling models, lead-generation pipelines, aur corporate roadmap blueprints draft karein.
business.growPlaceholderName: e.g. Acme SaaS ya Voice Agency
business.growPlaceholderAudience: e.g. Real estate agents, local clinics, students
business.growPlaceholderBottleneck: e.g. Leads nahi hain, pricing power low hai
business.chatPlaceholder: CAC, validation, outreach script optimize karne ke baare me poochein...
